name: Elite Aesthetics
description: An injectables-focused studio for clients who want to look refreshed, never overdone, under the care of a double board-certified physician.

hero.title: Refinement, not reinvention.
hero.subtitle: Physician-led Botox, filler, and skin rejuvenation crafted around your natural features, in a discreet studio setting.

contact.address: 88 Lexington Row, Suite 4B, New York, NY 10016

services.title: Botox & Tox Refinement
services.description: Micro-dosed neuromodulator treatments that soften expression lines while preserving natural movement.

services.title: Dermal Filler Sculpting
services.description: Structural filler placement to restore volume and balance facial proportions with a subtle, undetectable finish.

services.title: Microneedling RF
services.description: Radiofrequency microneedling that refines texture, minimizes pores, and tightens skin at a cellular level.

benefits: Every injection plan is performed and supervised directly by a double board-certified physician.
A natural-first philosophy: subtle enhancement over dramatic change.
Private, appointment-only studio with no waiting room crowds.
Advanced imaging used to map facial structure before every treatment.
Complimentary 6-week follow-up included with every injectable service.

testimonials.name: Camille Rousseau, Age 45
testimonials.quote: I was terrified of looking 'done.' Dr. Reyes and her team gave me the most natural results I've ever had from filler.

testimonials.name: Jonathan Pierce, Age 38
testimonials.quote: As someone new to injectables, I appreciated how conservative and honest the consultation was. No pressure to overdo it.

testimonials.name: Anaya Whitfield, Age 52
testimonials.quote: The microneedling RF sessions completely changed my skin's texture. People keep asking what I've been doing differently.

reviews.name: Margaret L.
reviews.text: Dr. Reyes is meticulous. I've had filler elsewhere that looked overdone, but here the results are so subtle people just think I look well-rested.

reviews.name: Theo B.
reviews.text: As a first-timer with Botox I appreciated how conservative the approach was. No pressure, just an honest recommendation.

reviews.name: Simone K.
reviews.text: The microneedling RF sessions were a bit more uncomfortable than I expected, but the texture improvement to my skin was worth it.

reviews.name: Priyanka D.
reviews.text: Discreet, private, and the follow-up appointment included in the price is a nice touch most studios skip.

faq.question: How is Elite Aesthetics different from a typical medspa?
faq.answer: Every treatment is performed by, or directly supervised by, our double board-certified physician rather than rotating technicians, and our focus stays exclusively on injectables and skin rejuvenation.

faq.question: Will filler or Botox look obvious?
faq.answer: Our approach favors micro-dosing and structural precision, aiming for results that read as well-rested rather than visibly treated.

faq.question: How long do results typically last?
faq.answer: Neuromodulator results generally last 3-4 months, while filler can last 9-18 months depending on placement and product used.

faq.question: Do you offer follow-up appointments?
faq.answer: Yes, every injectable service includes a complimentary 6-week follow-up to assess results and make any fine-tuning adjustments.
